source: Balancer first-party deployment inventory already captured in registryV2/surface/balancer/_deployments.json
batch_boundary: This artifact dispositiones Balancer top-level user-signed Vault/Router/Core deployment addresses for the current ActionBody decode scope. Pool/BPT child-token universe and liquidity verbs remain explicit user-facing DEFER batches measured in onboarding evidence; covered swaps/permissions do not route by pool tx.to.
